bead.title: B5: Reorder buildPrompt to place static instructions before bead metadata (prefix-cache)
bead.description: Optional / not on Story 12 critical path per /tmp/story-12-final.md §B5. buildPrompt at execute_bead.go:1392-1461 places dynamic bead metadata FIRST and static instructions LAST, so Anthropic's prefix-cache cannot help — every attempt cache-misses on the static suffix. Reordering to put static instructions first would unlock cache hits across attempts with the same prompt_sha. Reordering changes XML semantics and merits its own change with separate review. File now; prioritize separately.
bead.acceptance: buildPrompt emits static instructions before dynamic bead metadata. XML / prompt structure remains valid. All execute-bead tests still pass. prompt_sha (from B3) measurably increases cache hit rate across attempts in dogfood metrics (or at minimum, manifest comparisons across attempts of the same bead show identical prompt_sha prefix).
